currentFAQs.q: How much does a new garage door cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} for a new garage door installed, depending on size and material.

currentFAQs.q: Should I replace the opener when I get a new garage door?
currentFAQs.a: If your opener is more than 10 years old, replacing it with the door is usually more cost-effective. New openers are quieter, more secure, and include modern safety features.

currentFAQs.q: How long does garage door installation take?
currentFAQs.a: A standard garage door installation takes 3-5 hours. Custom doors or jobs requiring structural modifications may take a full day.

proposedFAQs.note: Hurricane/tornado zones require wind-rated doors; non-storm zones don't. Strong city-distinct signal.
